title: psoralea pubescens var. lasiostachys
intro: Psoralea pubescens var. lasiostachys, also known as the small or dwarf Indian bean, is a variety of the Psoralea pubescens plant, which is a flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the thyroid gland and increase metabolism. The health benefits of Psoralea pubescens var. lasiostachys include its potential to treat thyroid disorders, promote weight loss, and improve skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and infusing the roots and leaves, which can then be consumed as a tea or used in capsule form.
